dct_title_s: New York City School District Demographics, 2014-2015
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of City Planning
dct_description_sm: New York City School District Demographics, 2014-2015 is a polygon theme representing school districts in New York City in the 2014-2015 school year. Attribute information includes data from the NYC Department of Education demographic snapshot released in response to Local Law 59 passed in 2016. These demographic snapshots include information on enrollment by grade, sex, race and language. A codebook is included in the full download package. Columbia library staff accessed this data in April of 2026 from the NYC Open Data portal at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Education/2013-2018-Demographic-Snapshot-District/m2z7-dx25/about_data extracted the data for the year and joined to the district geographies provided from New York City Planning at https://www.nyc.gov/content/planning/pages/resources/datasets/school-districts for the appropriate year. Note - some district entries (75, 79, 84) may not have district geographies. Please see the attribute table for the full list. The file is provided it in the geopackage format in State Plane Long Island Coordinates.
